purpose: Canonical customer-facing title picker for authenticated MMG Knowledge Subscription entitlement windows.

security_contract.csrf_acquisition: The authenticated GET response issues or rotates the session-bound token through X-MMG-CSRF-Token; every POST returns the current token through the same header.
mutation_controls: Require a session-bound CSRF token for every mutation.
Derive the customer, subscription, and active window server-side.
Revalidate every asset before select, remove, or confirm.
Use optimistic concurrency on the entitlement-window version.
Persist a confirmation and its delivery grants transactionally.
Never trust browser ownership, entitlement totals, or eligibility decisions.

selection_rules: Owned assets are excluded from selectable results.
Services and subscription products are excluded.
Incomplete delivery packages and missing required media are excluded.
A title may be selected only while the entitlement window is open.
A selected title consumes its integer mmg.subscription_value units.
The same asset may appear only once in a window.
Only unconfirmed selections may be removed.
Confirmation requires exactly the target asset count and all available units.
Confirmed selections are locked and become delivery-grant inputs.

customer_states.loading: Fetch the authoritative snapshot and disable mutation controls.
customer_states.unauthenticated: Direct the customer to the Customer Portal sign-in flow.
customer_states.subscription_inactive: Show membership discovery without exposing selection controls.
customer_states.window_unavailable: Explain that no selection window is currently open.
customer_states.ready: Show eligible titles, filters, and remaining capacity.
customer_states.confirmed: Lock selections and direct the customer to My Library or the subscription dashboard.
customer_states.error: Preserve the last server snapshot, announce the error, and offer a refresh.

filter_contract.authority_rule: Client-side filters alter presentation only and never change server eligibility.

storefront_implementation.progressive_enhancement: Interactive subscription selection requires JavaScript and the authenticated Kairos endpoint. Public catalog links remain available without JavaScript.

integration_sequence.previous_component: MMG Knowledge Library eligibility metadata and selection-mode contract
integration_sequence.completed_dependency: MMG Entitlement Counter and Ownership-Resolution Persistence

release_gates: The secure HTTP handler is connected to the deployed authenticated API adapter.
The server derives customer, subscription, and window identities from the session.
The PostgreSQL entitlement and ownership migration is applied.
The entitlement-window repository supports atomic versioned writes.
Confirmation creates delivery grants and ownership grants transactionally and idempotently.
At least two verified subscription-selectable digital assets exist.
Every displayed title has verified portrait and square media plus a delivery package.
Owned assets cannot be selected or re-delivered as new entitlement consumption.
The picker passes mobile, keyboard, screen-reader, concurrency, idempotency, and authorization QA.
The live Knowledge Library page is not replaced until its current source is captured and the picker is integrated without removing Public Catalog behavior.
